title: March GameDev Social!
description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE. This is an all ages event, but minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. Alcoholic drinks are 100% optional. Dirty 20 has plenty of non-alcoholic drink options, yummy mac n' cheeses, and other munchies if you get hungry. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/312692350
location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us

title: Game Showcase at MADE Makerspace
description:
MADE Makerspace is hosting a Game Night highlighting the thriving game development scene in St. Louis. The event will showcase to the public the talented people making games in our city! It’s also a great opportunity for developers to connect with creative professionals outside their usual circles, share ideas, and build new collaborations. There will also be backyard games, food trucks, and ice cream!

This event is FREE and open to the general public— developers, gamers, and non-gamers alike. Bring your friends!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313645817
location: MADE Makerspace, 5127 Delmar Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63108, USA

title: March Game Audio Club
description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio.
We’re a chill group where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio. 

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313609575

title: Game Club: 30XX
description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design.  This month's game is the roguelite action platformer, 30XX! We will be meeting virtually on Discord this month (in the general voice chat). Come share your thoughts on the game with us!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see:https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313482156/

title: Gamedev Work Night
description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313609455
location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us
